meaning: n.[纺]维尼纶(聚乙烯醇缩醛纤维的统称)
examples: The physical chemistry properties of the vinylon-milk fiber was tested.
Polyvinyl alcohol can be used to produce vinylon, polyvinyl butyral, and polyvinyl formal.
Vinylon dipped canvas rubber industry is the best skeleton cloth, it has a strong, strong adhesion.
